member.name: T:VehicleService.API.Controllers.VehiclesController
member.summary: Manages the vehicle catalog — CRUD and advanced filtering.

member.name: M:VehicleService.API.Controllers.VehiclesController.GetAll(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Nullable{System.Decimal},System.Nullable{System.Decimal},System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.Nullable{System.Boolean},System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Get all vehicles with optional filters.

member.name: M:VehicleService.API.Controllers.VehiclesController.Create(VehicleService.Application.DTOs.CreateVehicleRequest)
member.summary: Create a new vehicle. Requires Admin role.

member.name: M:VehicleService.API.Controllers.VehiclesController.Update(System.Guid,VehicleService.Application.DTOs.UpdateVehicleRequest)
member.summary: Update an existing vehicle. Requires Admin role.

member.name: M:VehicleService.API.Controllers.VehiclesController.Delete(System.Guid)
member.summary: Delete a vehicle. Requires Admin role.
